title: TransactionDerived
description: Derived information across one or more aggregated transactions.

creditTotal.description: The sum of all credit transactions.

debitTotal.description: The sum of all debit transactions.

totalUnpaidBills.description: The total number of unpaid bills identified. If the threshold  TOP is applied, this number may not match with the number of  bills returned in the insight.

debtToIncomeRatio.description: Debt to income ratio calculated as (monthly recurring debt / average monthly income) * 100

averageMonthlyIncome.description: Average monthly income for the duration.

monthlyRecurringPaymentTotal.description: Identified monthly recurring payments for the user derived from minimum due amount across all cards, loan payments, rent payments, mortgage payments, alimoney and child care support.

dateRange.description: The date range considered to compute the values.
